rules.title: Park Proximity Restriction
rules.description: Mobile food units and food trucks shall not operate within 50 feet of a public park entrance, playground, or school property boundary.

rules.title: Residential Buffer Zone
rules.description: No commercial food service operation may be conducted within 100 feet of a residentially-zoned parcel between the hours of 9:00 PM and 7:00 AM.

rules.title: Commercial Zone Requirement
rules.description: Brick-and-mortar food service establishments require a C-1 (Neighborhood Commercial) or higher zoning classification. C-2 (General Commercial) is required for establishments exceeding 2,500 sq ft.

rules.title: Sidewalk Clearance
rules.description: Mobile vendors must maintain a minimum 6-foot clear pedestrian pathway on all sidewalks at all times.

rules.title: Operating Hours
rules.description: Mobile food units in commercial zones (C-1, C-2) may operate between 6:00 AM and 10:00 PM. Extended hours require a Special Use Permit.

rules.title: Signage Restrictions
rules.description: Exterior signage for commercial establishments shall not exceed 32 sq ft in C-1 zones or 64 sq ft in C-2 zones. Illuminated signs require separate electrical permits.

rules.title: Parking Requirements
rules.description: Restaurants exceeding 1,500 sq ft must provide 1 off-street parking space per 200 sq ft of dining area, or pay into the city's parking mitigation fund.

rules.title: Outdoor Seating Permit
rules.description: Any outdoor dining area on public right-of-way requires a Street Use Permit. Tables and chairs must be removed nightly unless a permanent installation permit is obtained.
